title: Sky: Children of the Light
notes:
Art You Can Walk Through
Explore beautiful, playable environments made from Van Gogh's best known paintings, from sunlit fields in the Netherlands to the glowing night skies that only he could imagine. Each and every landscape is a work of art in motion, rendered in his bold, expressive brushstroke style and alive with the emotion he poured into every canvas.

For details: http://bit.ly/sky-patchnotes

title: Merge Cooking®
notes:
Welcome back, Chef!
A new version of Merge Cooking is available!
To provide a better experience, we're working hard to optimize the game performance as well as bring you exciting content.
We hope you can enjoy the time playing!
New to the game? Don't worry. We've prepared step-by-step instructions to guide you through. Join us and have some fun.

title: EA SPORTS FC™ Football Mobile
notes:
Play The World’s Game update. Compete in a global football tournament and lead your national team to glory. Experience authentic player attributes with Playstyles that bring athletes' unique abilities to life.  Instantly connect with friends & play PVP in Quick Match. FC Mobile now supports Hindi, Czech & Polish The World’s Game Update also features a brand new nostalgia-themed soundtrack.

THE WORLD’S GAME TOURNAMENT 
Compete vs the world in The World’s Game international football tournament. C

title: Bingo Voyage: Live Bingo Games
notes:
Thank you for being part of our amazing community! We are dedicated to bringing you the #1 gaming experience, and this update is no exception.

Update now to enjoy: 
• Fresh in-game events and rewards
• A smoother, bug-free experience
• Exciting new improvements and surprises

Ready to play? Let’s go! Don't forget to leave us a review—we love hearing from you!

title: Palmon: Survival
notes: Enhanced game stability and performance optimizations.

title: mo.co
notes:
● Weapon Mastery is here! Every weapon now has its own progression path. Earn stars in Elite contracts with the weapon, clear Dojo Challenges, and hit other weapon Milestones to unlock rewards — including a Golden variant of the Weapon Skins, a unique title, and of course - mo.gold.
● Daily Goal Streaks! Hit your daily goals day af ter day to build a streak and unlock double rewards!
● Elite Hunter improvements — More clarity on what the track is and a cleaner screen for each time you upgrade yo
